OverHistory.NewCommentry: Nandre Burger to Sanju Samson Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Nandre Burger bowling to Sanju Samson, good length ball, pitching on leg stump, Sanju Samson plays an aggressive front foot flick WICKET Sanju Samson b Nandre Burger (Chennai Super Kings 14 Runs for 1 wickets)
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Nandre Burger bowling to Sanju Samson, Burger the man! He gets Sanju first up! good length ball, pitching on leg stump, Sanju Samson tries to work this on the on-side with the flick, the ball seamed up beautifully to beat his bat. Hits the top of off-stump to get RR the first wicket! Burger is just elated, so is RR! Not a debut to remember for Sanju in Yellow! 

WICKET Sanju Samson b Nandre Burger (Chennai Super Kings 14 Runs for 1 wickets)

The roar, the jump, the absolute joy! ????

Nandre Burger with a peach of a delivery to give #RR a perfect start ????

WICKET Ruturaj Gaikwad b Jofra Archer (Chennai Super Kings 19 Runs for 2 wickets)

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Nandre Burger to Ayush Mhatre Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Nandre Burger bowling to Ayush Mhatre, short length ball, pitching outside leg stump, Ayush Mhatre plays an aggressive pull shot on the back foot WICKET Ayush Mhatre c Dhruv Jurel b Nandre Burger (Chennai Super Kings 19 Runs for 3 wickets) towards Wicket Keeper
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Nandre Burger bowling to Ayush Mhatre, RR go wild in the PP! short-length ball, pitching outside leg stump; this was a well-directed bouncer coming all the way to Mhatre, who looks to help it on its way; all he can do is just glove it! Loud Shout for Caught behind, turned down, they go up for the review. The replay shows a spike near the glove and the catch was taken with ease, too! CSK are three down! 

WICKET Ayush Mhatre c Dhruv Jurel b Nandre Burger (Chennai Super Kings 19 Runs for 3 wickets)

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Sandeep Sharma to Matthew Short Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Sandeep Sharma bowling to Matthew Short, good length ball, pitching on off stump, Matthew Short plays a defensive forward push WICKET Matthew Short c Yashasvi Jaiswal b Sandeep Sharma (Chennai Super Kings 38 Runs for 4 wickets) towards Mid-Wicket
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Sandeep Sharma bowling to Matthew Short, Sandeep Sharma strikes first up! CSK have no answers at all! good length ball, pitching on off stump, Matthew Short tries to work this over the infield, does not bother to keep this down as he was very early in his attempt! The ball goes straight into the hands of Jaiswal at short mid-wicket, and he takes the catch! CSK are four down and are in deep deep trouble! 

WICKET Matthew Short c Yashasvi Jaiswal b Sandeep Sharma (Chennai Super Kings 38 Runs for 4 wickets)

OverHistory.Commentry: Ravindra Jadeja bowling to Sarfaraz Khan, good length ball, pitching on off stump, Sarfaraz Khan plays a slog sweep WICKET Sarfaraz Khan lbw Ravindra Jadeja (Chennai Super Kings 51 Runs for 5 wickets)
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Ravindra Jadeja bowling to Sarfaraz Khan, You miss and I hit! good length ball, pitching on off stump, Sarfaraz Khan goes on his knee to sweep this, misses the ball coming from Jadeja from the arm, he gets hit below the shoulder, loud shout for LBW given immediately! CSK go upstairs, but the replay shows three reds
 

WICKET Sarfaraz Khan lbw Ravindra Jadeja (Chennai Super Kings 51 Runs for 5 wickets)

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Brijesh Sharma to Kartik Sharma Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Brijesh Sharma bowling to Kartik Sharma, full length ball, pitching on middle stump, Kartik Sharma plays an aggressive front foot flick WICKET Kartik Sharma lbw Brijesh Sharma (Chennai Super Kings 74 Runs for 7 wickets)
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Brijesh Sharma bowling to Kartik Sharma, Sharma the debutant gets rid of another Sharma the debutant! full length ball, pitching on middle stump, Kartik Sharma misses the flick completely as he misjudges the ball coming with the angle, the ball does enough to beat the bat, traps him front and up goes the finger in a flash! RR are just all over as Sharma gets his first IPL wicket. Sharma

WICKET Kartik Sharma lbw Brijesh Sharma (Chennai Super Kings 74 Runs for 7 wickets)

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Jofra Archer to Noor Ahmad Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Jofra Archer bowling to Noor Ahmad, full length ball, pitching outside off stump, Noor Ahmad plays an aggressive off drive on the front foot WICKET Noor Ahmad c Dhruv Jurel b Jofra Archer (Chennai Super Kings 82 Runs for 8 wickets) towards Wicket Keeper
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Jofra Archer bowling to Noor Ahmad,Edged and Taken!  full length ball, pitching outside off stump, Noor Ahmad tries to open the off-side with a drive away from his body, he had no foot movement at all, ending up edging the ball as it carries through to the keeper! Jurel behind takes a regulation catch! 

WICKET Noor Ahmad c Dhruv Jurel b Jofra Archer (Chennai Super Kings 82 Runs for 8 wickets)

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Sandeep Sharma to Jamie Overton Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Sandeep Sharma bowling to Jamie Overton, good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Jamie Overton plays an aggressive pull shot on the back foot for 1 run(s) WICKET Anshul Kamboj run out Shimron Hetmyer (Chennai Super Kings 127 Runs for 10 wickets) towards Mid-Wicket
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Sandeep Sharma bowling to Jamie Overton, Not the start CSK would have wanted! RR will be the happier side so far! good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Jamie Overton goes for a pull, gets it in the toe-end of the bat, he decides to come back for the second, but was very late in decision making. Hetmyer at mid-wicket fires a sharp throw for Jurel to collect and whip the bails and Kamboj is run out! CSK are bowled out for 127 with two balls to spare! 

WICKET Anshul Kamboj run out Shimron Hetmyer (Chennai Super Kings 127 Runs for 10 wickets)

 

Innings Break!
